Who We Are

Dosa Projects –
Building Excellence

Dosa Projects is a dedicated construction and landscaping company committed to delivering high-quality, reliable, and cost-effective building solutions. We take pride in turning our clients' ideas into reality through professional workmanship, attention to detail, and a strong focus on customer satisfaction.

With a skilled and experienced team, we specialise in a wide range of services including building construction, renovations, remodeling, site preparation, and landscaping. Whether it's a small upgrade or a large-scale project, we approach every job with the same level of professionalism and excellence.

At Dosa Projects, we understand that every project is an investment. That's why we work closely with our clients from start to finish — ensuring clear communication, transparency, and on-time delivery. Our goal is not just to build structures, but to build lasting relationships based on trust and quality service.

We are passionate about creating spaces that are functional, durable, and visually appealing. When you choose Dosa Projects, you choose a partner who is committed to bringing your vision to life.

🏛️CIPC Registered
🏗️NHBRC Accredited
📋CIDB Registered

Our Vision

To become a leading construction and landscaping company known for quality, innovation, and excellence in every project we deliver.

🎯

Our Mission

To provide professional, reliable, and cost-effective construction and landscaping services while maintaining the highest standards of workmanship, integrity, and customer satisfaction.

💎

Our Commitment

We don't just build structures — we build lasting relationships. Every client, every project, every day we strive to exceed expectations and deliver results that stand the test of time.

What We Do

Comprehensive Construction
& Property Services

From ground-breaking to final finish — end-to-end solutions with precision and professionalism.

New Builds

Building Construction

Turnkey building solutions for residential and commercial clients — executing every project to the highest structural and aesthetic standards.

  • Residential homes — new builds
  • Commercial buildings
  • Extensions and additional structures
  • Turnkey construction solutions
Renovation

Renovation & Remodeling

Transform your existing space into something extraordinary. All scales — cosmetic refreshes to full structural remodels.

  • Home and office renovations
  • Kitchen and bathroom upgrades
  • Interior and exterior remodeling
  • Property refurbishments
Structural

Foundation & Structural Work

Engineering-grade precision to every pour and reinforcement. A great structure starts with a great foundation.

  • Foundation laying
  • Concrete works
  • Structural repairs and reinforcements
  • Slab construction
Site Prep

Site Preparation & Earthworks

Before a single brick is laid, the groundwork must be right. Professional-grade equipment and meticulous care.

  • Land clearing
  • Excavation services
  • Site leveling and grading
  • Trenching
Management

Project Management

Full coordination from planning and procurement through to on-site supervision and final handover.

  • Full project planning and coordination
  • Budgeting and cost control
  • Timeline management
  • On-site supervision
Landscaping

Landscaping Services

Outdoor environments that complement your property and elevate its value — garden design to paved walkways.

  • Garden design and installation
  • Lawn installation and maintenance
  • Paving and walkways
  • Outdoor spaces and aesthetics
Maintenance

Maintenance & Repairs

Responsive, reliable service to keep your property in peak condition and protect your investment.

  • General property maintenance
  • Plumbing and minor electrical work
  • Repairs and touch-ups
  • Preventative maintenance plans
